headline: Baker Hughes Announces Sale of Waygate Technologies to Hexagon
summary: Baker Hughes to sell Waygate Technologies business to Hexagon in an all-cash transaction for approximately $1.45 billion, before customary closing adjustmentsThis transaction is consistent with Baker Hughes’ strategic approach to value creation and portfolio management HOUSTON and LONDON, April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR, “the Company”), an energy technology company, announced Monday that it has entered into an agreement to sell its Waygate Technologies business to He
